response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: MemberOf(annJLand, philadelphiaCityCouncil)
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: exists x (MemberOf(annJLand, x))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: (MemberOf(annJLand, philadelphiaCityCouncil) & MemberOf(annJLand, democraticParty) & MemberOf(annJLand, someOtherEntity))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: MemberOf(democraticParty, philadelphiaCityCouncil)
